templates.name: Welcome Email
templates.subject: Welcome to {{dojoName}}, {{studentName}}!
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

{{studentName}} is officially enrolled at {{dojoName}} in our {{disciplineName}} program, starting from a {{beltName}} belt. We can't wait to see them on the mat!

See you in class,
{{dojoName}}

templates.name: Welcome WhatsApp
templates.body: Welcome to {{dojoName}}, {{studentName}}! 🥋 Enrollment is confirmed for our {{disciplineName}} program. See you on the mat!

templates.name: Absence Notice
templates.body: {{dojoName}}: {{studentName}} was marked absent from today's {{className}} class. Reply if this was unexpected.

templates.name: Attendance Confirmation
templates.body: Hi {{parentName}}, {{studentName}} attended {{className}} today and earned attendance points. Great job! 🎉

templates.name: Evaluation Result
templates.subject: {{studentName}}'s {{track}} evaluation result
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

{{studentName}} was evaluated on {{track}} today with a result of: {{result}}.

Coach notes: {{notes}}

templates.name: Belt Promotion
templates.body: 🥋 Congratulations! {{studentName}} has been promoted to {{beltName}} belt at {{dojoName}}! We're proud of this achievement.

templates.name: Belt Promotion Certificate
templates.subject: {{studentName}} has been promoted to {{beltName}} belt!
templates.body:
Dear {{parentName}},

We're thrilled to let you know that {{studentName}} has earned their {{beltName}} belt at {{dojoName}}. This reflects real dedication and hard work.

Congratulations from all of us!

templates.name: OTP Code
templates.body: Your {{dojoName}} verification code is {{code}}. It expires in 10 minutes. Do not share this code with anyone.

templates.name: Seasonal Enrollment Drive
templates.subject: New term starting soon at {{dojoName}} 🥋
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

Our new term is starting soon — now's a great time to bring a friend along or ask about our advanced programs.

See you on the mat!

templates.name: Monthly Newsletter
templates.subject: {{dojoName}} Monthly Newsletter
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

Here's what's been happening at {{dojoName}} this month — student spotlights, upcoming events, and belt promotions.

templates.name: Referral Discount
templates.subject: Refer a friend, get a month free at {{dojoName}}
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

Refer a friend to {{dojoName}} and you'll both get a discount on next month's fees. Ask us for details!

templates.name: Flash Promo
templates.body: 🎉 Limited time at {{dojoName}}: {{message}} Reply to claim before it ends!

templates.name: Progress Report
templates.subject: {{studentName}}'s progress report
templates.body:
Hi {{parentName}},

Attached is {{studentName}}'s latest progress report from {{dojoName}}, covering attendance, evaluations, and belt progress.
